name: Hermione Granger
key_facts: Muggle-born witch, parents are dentists named Jean and Wendell Granger
Top of her year in almost every subject at Hogwarts
Founded S.P.E.W. (Society for the Promotion of Elfish Welfare) in fourth year
Used a Time-Turner in third year to attend extra classes
Dropped Divination in third year because she found it an imprecise and woolly discipline with no basis in real magic
Helped Harry and Ron locate and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes
Obliviated her own parents' memories to protect them during the Second Wizarding War
Brewed Polyjuice Potion successfully in second year, aged 12
Earned 10 O.W.L.s, all at Outstanding or Exceeds Expectations
Later became the first Muggle-born Minister for Magic
Married Ron Weasley after the war, has two children Rose and Hugo
Wand: Vine wood, dragon heartstring core, 10 and three quarter inches
Boggart: Professor McGonagall telling her she had failed everything

relationships.Harry Potter: Best friend. Would give her life for him. Partners in defeating Voldemort.
relationships.Ron Weasley: Best friend, later romantic partner and husband. Bickered often but deeply complementary personalities.
relationships.Draco Malfoy: Long-standing antagonist. She slapped him in third year. He called her a Mudblood.
relationships.Professor McGonagall: Deeply admired teacher and mentor. Hermione strove for her approval.
relationships.Professor Dumbledore: Trusted headmaster who left her the Tales of Beedle the Bard.
relationships.Professor Snape: Respected his intellect but resented his favoritism toward Slytherin.
relationships.Viktor Krum: Romantic interest during Goblet of Fire and the Yule Ball.

arc_by_book.Philosopher's Stone: Initially bossy and friendless, becomes true friends with Harry and Ron after the troll incident.
arc_by_book.Chamber of Secrets: Researches the Basilisk and is Petrified for weeks. Leaves a vital clue even while unconscious.
arc_by_book.Prisoner of Azkaban: Uses a Time-Turner, drops Divination, helps free Sirius Black and Buckbeak.
arc_by_book.Goblet of Fire: Champions Muggle-born rights with S.P.E.W., attends Yule Ball with Viktor Krum.
arc_by_book.Order of the Phoenix: Co-founds Dumbledore's Army, fights at the Battle of the Department of Mysteries.
arc_by_book.Half-Blood Prince: Increasingly emotional about Ron, helps Harry prepare for the Horcrux hunt.
arc_by_book.Deathly Hallows: Erases her parents' memories, spends a year hunting Horcruxes, fights in the Battle of Hogwarts.
